title: Image dropdowns?
excerpt: Is it possible to show a dropdown that has text and image content?  I have a board for remodeling requests and I’d like dropdowns like Paint Color, Flooring Options, Wallpaper Options, etc. that show the item number for …

posts.author: BillReid (Bill Reid)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to show a dropdown that has text and image content? I have a board for remodeling requests and I’d like dropdowns like Paint Color, Flooring Options, Wallpaper Options, etc. that show the item number for the selection alongside an image sample. Third party options would be entertained.
